data.title: BNB Chain TVL Incentive Program #5 has ended, and 5 projects have received delegated support
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, BNB Chain TVL Incentive Plan #5 has ended, and 5 projects have received delegated support, namely: KERNELDAO, ASTHERUS, YIELDNEST, TRANCHESS and LISTA-DAO.

data.title: Analysis: Deribit options market shows investors are not optimistic about XRP's near-term price action
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News XRP may be the next cryptocurrency to be listed on a spot ETF in the United States after Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH). However, the options market listed on Deribit is not optimistic, and put options linked to XRP have been higher than call options in multiple time periods. Put options typically provide insurance against price declines, and traders buy put options when they seek to hedge or profit from expected price declines. However, compared with Solana's SOL and other tokens, XRP's order book depth is relatively good, which means it can easily complete large order transactions at a stable price. (CoinDesk)

data.title: VanEck to Launch NODE ETF to Offer Broad Exposure to Crypto-Related Stocks
data.description:
TL;DR VanEck is set to launch the NODE ETF on May 14, providing exposure to 30 to 60 stocks tied to the crypto ecosystem, including exchanges, Bitcoin miners, and data centers. NODE aims to democratize access to the sector without requiring direct purchase of digital assets. Despite SEC delays on other products, this ETF marks. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/vaneck-to-launch-node-etf-to-offer-broad-exposure-to-crypto-related-stocks/

data.title: Planet Evening News
Analyst: The Fed may not cut interest rates ahead of schedule, and BTC is expected to remain in the range of $80,000 to $90,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: After Federal Reserve Chairman Powell dispelled the hope of early rate cuts, the cryptocurrency market fell briefly and then rebounded. BTSE Chief Operating Officer Jeff Mei said that the Federal Reserve may not cut interest rates in advance in the short term, so it is expected that the price of Bitcoin will remain in the range of 80,000 to 90,000 US dollars; SignalPlus analysis director Augustine Fan pointed out that cryptocurrency trading is volatile most of the time, but as long as BTC can maintain above $81,000, the technical side will still be more constructive in the short term. The market is concerned about the details of Trump’s first trade agreement and the corporate earnings season starting next week. (CoinDesk)

data.title: OKX Expands to U.S. After $500M DOJ Settlement
data.description:
**OKX Expands Its Operations to the United States Following a Substantial $500 Million Settlement with the Department of Justice** 

In a significant move that underscores its commitment to growth and compliance, the cryptocurrency exchange platform OKX has announced its expansion into the United States market. This expansion comes on the heels of a monumental $500 million settlement with the Department of Justice, a resolution that marks a pivotal moment for the company as it seeks to navigate the regulatory landscape in the U.S. With this strategic move, OKX aims to enhance its presence and offer its services to a broader audience while adhering to the legal standards set forth by American authorities.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/okx-expands-to-us-after-500m-doj-settlement
